command:
echo '=== Run #10 jobs ===' && curl -s 'https://api.github.com/repos/motitap-dotcom/MT5-PropFirm-Bot/actions/runs/22462173003/jobs' | python3 << 'PYEOF'
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
for j in d.get('jobs', []):
    print(f"Job: {j['name']} - {j['status']}/{j.get('conclusion','?')}")
    for s in j.get('steps', []):
        print(f"  [{s.get('conclusion', s['status'])}] {s['name']}")
PYEOF
echo '=== Run #10 logs (compile job) ===' && JOBID=$(curl -s 'https://api.github.com/repos/motitap-dotcom/MT5-PropFirm-Bot/actions/runs/22462173003/jobs' | python3 -c 'import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)["jobs"][0]["id"])' 2>&1) && echo "Job ID: $JOBID" && curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/motitap-dotcom/MT5-PropFirm-Bot/actions/jobs/$JOBID/logs" 2>&1 | tail -100
